title: Step-By-Step Guide to Event Planning
description: Step-By-Step Guide to Event Planning How to plan in-person events Learn More Plan Ahead View the University Events Calendar prior to requesting your event to avoid conflicts with other University Events. Alternatively, email events@yu.edu when conceptualizing a large event for date recommendations.
